reviews.comment:
En lo personal no prefiero los combustibles de YPF , el servicio de la YPF del ACA es aceptable , los baños están limpios y el servicio de aire funciona bien  .Tiene además servicio de lavado , gomería y aspiradora .También venta de lubricantes y algunos repuestos como correas lámparas y algunos accesorios de seguridad.Tiene Bar.
De noche ,menos combustibles y aire , todo cerrado.

(Translated by Google)
Personally, I don't prefer YPF fuel. The service at the YPF station at the ACA is acceptable; the restrooms are clean, and the air conditioning works well. It also has a car wash, tire repair shop, and vacuum cleaner. They also sell lubricants and some spare parts like belts, lights, and some safety accessories. There's a bar. At night, fuel and air conditioning are less available, and everything is closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNU1TLTN3RRAB
